g.text: Follow Gran down the sandy path.
Step out onto the flat low-tide rocks.
Hurry to the sea star on the high ledge.
Climb the low steps for a closer look.
Think up a rescue plan for Stella.
Toss water up with your cupped hands.
Line up the plans and try again.
Carry the full bucket up the little slop...
Shake off the splash and try again.
Wet your hands and gently slide Stella d...
Look over the plans once more.
Watch Stella settle into her pool.
Hurry toward the flappy splashing sound.
Sit with Gran and let the tide finish th...
Lean in and say hello to the little fish...
Think up a plan to move Flick.
Catch Flick with your bare hands.
Line up the plans and try again.
Dig a little river over to the big pool.
Smooth the sand and try again.
Scoop water and fish up together in the ...
Scoop water and fish up together, Gran's...
Look over the plans once more.
Watch Flick zoom around his big new pool...
Follow the clack-clack sound to the seaw...
Cross the rocks to the seaweed patch.
Crouch down beside the tangled crab.
Think up a plan to untangle Pinch.
Give the seaweed one quick tug.
Hold out the picnic spoon for Pinch to g...
Pocket the spoon and try again.
Untangle one seaweed ribbon at a time.
Untangle one ribbon at a time, Gran's wa...
Look over the plans once more.
Watch Pinch scuttle into the cool pool.
Head for the tiny shell far up the rock.
Watch from Gran's towel while the tide f...
Tiptoe up the dry rock to the tiny shell...
Bend down and greet the little periwinkl...
Think up a plan to bring Winnie home.
Roll Winnie along like a tiny wheel.
Smile at the stubborn shell and try agai...
Cheer for Winnie to walk faster.
Line up the plans and try again.
Offer Winnie a ride on your wet palm.
Offer Winnie a wet-palm ride, Gran's way...
Look over the plans once more.
Lower Winnie into her cool pool.
Look up at the sparkling line of the sea...
Watch the first wave-finger slide in.
Follow the tide from pool to pool.
Climb up beside Gran on the flat rock.
Open the picnic basket to celebrate.
Cheer as Stella's pool spills over.
Race the foam line up the dry sand.
Peek around for anyone else who needs he...
Run the last few splashy-sounding steps.
Call each friend's name as their pool fi...
Raise juice cups to the rescue team.
Tell Gran the whole rescue story.
Plan the next low-tide rescue patrol.
